title: Pan-Seared Hake with Egyptian Spices
description: A flavorful and healthy gluten-free dish made with hake, a type of fish, and a blend of Egyptian spices.

ingredients.name: Egyptian Spices
ingredients.notes: Blend of cumin, coriander, and paprika

instructions: Season the hake fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the hake fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the hake is cooking, heat the Egyptian spices and tagine in a small saucepan over low heat.
Flake the cooked hake into large pieces and serve with the Egyptian spice mixture spooned over the top.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve immediately.
